FiveMinuteHomeRoutine: Parent greets child in Malayalam once a day
CanDoGoal: I can say hello and thank you

FiveMinuteHomeRoutine: Point to family photos and say names
CanDoGoal: I can name two family members

FiveMinuteHomeRoutine: Point to animal pictures and make sounds
CanDoGoal: I can say two animal words
I can follow one action word

WordsOrPhrases: my name is I am fine

FiveMinuteHomeRoutine: Name school objects while packing bag
CanDoGoal: I can name three school items

WordsOrPhrases: I want water I want rice
CanDoGoal: I can ask for one food item

FiveMinuteHomeRoutine: Draw a simple map and name places
CanDoGoal: I can ask where a place is
I can say how I feel
I can introduce myself with details

WordsOrPhrases: how are you did you eat I am fine
CanDoGoal: I can speak two lines in a family call

WordsOrPhrases: how much I want I do not want
CanDoGoal: I can ask price and choose an item

WordsOrPhrases: where is bus stop bathroom shop
FiveMinuteHomeRoutine: Use a map and ask directions

CanDoGoal: I can tell a three-line story

WordsOrPhrases: please thank you elder forms polite speech
CanDoGoal: I can choose a polite phrase
